headline: Assessing Lennox International (LII) Valuation After Record Margins And Softer HVAC Demand
summary: Dividend affirmation highlights Lennox International (LII) income profile The latest catalyst for Lennox International (LII) is its board approving a quarterly cash dividend of $1.30 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 31. See our latest analysis for Lennox International. Despite the latest dividend affirmation, recent trading has been weak, with a 21.5% decline in the 30 day share price return and a 23.35% drop in the 1 year total shareholder return. By...
